message:
feat(proptest): add 17 serde roundtrip tests across policy, identity_graph, output_renderers

- proptest_policy.rs (10 new, 94→104): RuleEvaluation, DecisionEvidence,
  RateLimitSnapshot, AppliedRiskFactor, RiskFactor, ApprovalRequest,
  SendTextAuditSummary (with None-optional variant), RiskFactor category
- proptest_identity_graph.rs (4 new, 63→67): AuthGrant, Delegation,
  GroupMembership, AuthzAuditEntry serde roundtrips
- proptest_output_renderers.rs (3 new, 11→14): WorkflowStepResult,
  WorkflowResult, Summary serde roundtrips
- output/mod.rs: re-export Summary, WorkflowResult, WorkflowStepResult

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
